subject: fix: remove X-Frame-Options — public dashboard doesn't need it
body:
Revert to simpler approach: remove X-Frame-Options entirely instead
of the /embed path workaround. The dashboard is public, read-only,
with no auth — there are no actions to clickjack. The embed feature
is designed for cross-origin use (CVs, portfolios, external apps).

This means no changes needed in see-veo or other embedding apps —
existing ?embed= URLs work as before.

Tags: security, embed, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: embed-system
Semver: patch
